# src/api-client/

**GENERATED — do not edit by hand.**

This directory is regenerated on every `pnpm codegen` and on every CI build from the
backend's `openapi.json`. Any manual edits will be silently lost.

If you need custom behavior on top of the generated client (interceptors, retries,
auth headers), add a wrapper in `src/lib/client.ts`.

If a type here is wrong, the backend spec is wrong — fix it there and regenerate.
